subject: Vacation Requests
body:
Do you need or want to be informed of LSJ Staff Vacation Requests?  Or  
should I deal with Lance and Maren about vacations without you.  FYI,  generally, 
as long as Lance and Maren can confirm that there is coverage  for your needs 
and the request is not in excess of vacation benefits  granted, I would not 
object to any vacation requests that they submit to me  on behalf of LSJ.  If 
Lance and Maren themselves ask for time off, I would  discuss that with you since 
it would most directly impact you.  Of course,  I would ask Lance and Maren 
to make sure that Brice and/or Karen would be  available to fill in for them.
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison  Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone:  212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 862-485-6315
e-mail:  dkiesq@aol.com


------------------------------

federal, state, or local  tax matter was written in connection with the

in this email. Each  taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's 
particular circumstances  from an independent tax advisor.
